gpt_comment: ⚠️[DIVERGENT]. Meteoblue predicts a dry day while the baseline predicts 79% rain. Meteoblue: 0.1-0.2" rain not stated when, baseline: constant rain. Seems like a gamble, maybe take an umbrella just in case, you don't want to be caught in the rain like a soaked monkey.
